name: SR Bancorp, Inc.
business: SR Bancorp, Inc. is the holding company for Somerset Regal Bank, a New Jersey chartered commercial bank. The bank offers deposit and loan products to individuals and small businesses in its primary market area of central and northern New Jersey. It operates from 14 branches in Essex, Hunterdon, Middlesex, Morris, Somerset, and Union Counties.

exposures.sentence: Competition for loans also comes from non-depository financial service companies entering the mortgage market, such as insurance companies, securities companies, financial technology companies and specialty finance companies.
Cyber-attacks or other security breaches could adversely affect our operations, net income or reputation.
